basic_details.job_title: Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Visakhapatnam Port Authority, under its General Administration Department (Personnel Division), has released a recruitment notice for the engagement of a Fire Officer on a contract basis to work in the Marine Department. Below is a quick overview table summarizing the key details of this recruitment.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 09.07.2026 Crucial Date for Determining Eligibility: 09.07.2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 10.08.2026 | Candidates should note that the crucial date for determining eligibility (age, qualification, and experience) is the date of notification, i.e., 09.07.2026, and not the last date of application.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer recruitment 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification or Port website for any updates on this matter.

age_limit.age_details: Contract basis, initially for one year
age_limit.details: The age limit and physical standards prescribed for the Fire Officer post are given below: | Apart from the qualifications above, candidates are expected to demonstrate the following capabilities: | Excellent communication skills, especially in English, Hindi, and Telugu. Proficiency in operating computers and MS Office. Capability in all fire fighting and fire prevention arrangements in the Port area. Ability to handle correspondence related to Fire Service matters, establishment, and stores. Capability to supervise the Fire Safety Inspector's duties and responsibilities. Ability to advise and instruct on maintaining Fire Fighting Units in good repair. Capability to supervise safety arrangements for handling hazardous cargo in the Port area. Ability to maintain liaison with other fire fighting services in Visakhapatnam and implement the mutual aid scheme. Capability to assist in drawing up and implementing a Civil Defence Plan when required. Willingness to attend to all other duties as prescribed by the Competent Authorities.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the Fire Officer post must fulfil the educational qualification, experience, age, and physical standards specified in the notification, as on the date of notification. | The essential educational qualifications for the Fire Officer post are as follows: | Must be a Graduate from a recognized University or Institution. Must have undergone 6 (six) months of training in a recognized Fire Training Institute or College. Should possess a Driving License for Light and Heavy Vehicles. | Experience requirements: | Minimum 3 (three) years of working experience in a supervisory capacity in a large Fire Service Establishment in an Industry or Government Undertaking. Candidates recommended for interview will have to undergo a Heavy Vehicle driving test.

salary_details.details: The Fire Officer engaged on contract basis will be paid a consolidated monthly remuneration of Rs. 60,000/- (Rupees Sixty Thousand only), subject to applicability of the DoPT Office Memorandum on fixation of pay in respect of retired government employees. No other benefits are payable apart from this consolidated remuneration. | Key terms and conditions of the contract include: | Contract Duration: Initially one year from the date of joining/reporting, extendable at the discretion of the Port Authority based on satisfactory performance. The engagement does not confer any right to continuous employment or any regular appointment in VPA. Reporting and Duty: The candidate must report to duty immediately on issue of the appointment order and work under the control of the Dy. Conservator (HoD), VPA, at the Fire Service Section, with a minimum duty of 8 hours per day (general/shifts). Leave: Eligible for 12 days of leave in a calendar year on a pro-rata basis, subject to prior permission from the competent authority. Periodical Fitness: Required to undergo medical tests as prescribed in VPA Regulations and report to duty only after medical fitness is certified by the CMO/VPA. Training: On-the-job training to operate the Fire Fighting System at VPA is mandatory. Accommodation: A suitable Type IV quarter may be provided on request at standard/market rent, subject to availability (bachelor accommodation is not provided), with water, electricity, and conservancy charges payable on actuals. Mobile Reimbursement: Up to Rs. 500/- per month towards mobile phone recharge, or actuals, whichever is lower. Uniform: The Fire Officer must wear a proper uniform at his own cost during duty hours and follow all safety norms. Medical Facility: In case of any accident or injury while on duty, medical facilities will be provided only at GJH (Government/King George Hospital). Headquarters: The Fire Officer should not leave the headquarters without proper permission from the Deputy Conservator. Applicability of Regulations: The VPE (Temporary) Regulations do not apply to employees engaged on contract basis. Income Tax: Applicable income tax will be recovered from the remuneration as per extant IT Rules. Attendance: Must attend on all working days and Port holidays, including emergencies after duty hours, without any additional remuneration. Transport: The candidate must arrange his own transport for attending the work spot as per the schedule decided by the competent authority. Termination and Resignation: VPA reserves the right to terminate or rescind the contract at any time without assigning reasons. A Fire Officer wishing to resign must give one month's notice; failure to do so will result in forfeiture of one month's remuneration. Disputes: Any disputes arising during the contract period will be referred to the Chairperson, VPA, whose decision will be final and binding.

selection_process: The selection process for the Fire Officer post

Screening of applications and supporting documents by a Certificate Verification Committee. Only eligible candidates recommended by the Certificate Verification Committee will be considered for the interview. Candidates recommended for interview will also be required to undergo a Heavy Vehicle driving test.
Note: Mere submission of an application does not confer any right to be called for selection or interview. VPA reserves the right to cancel the notification or increase/decrease the number of posts
and may also devise its own method of selecting candidates.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates need to apply offline by following these steps:
Download or prepare the Model Application Format (Annexure-I) as given in the official notification, preferably in typed format.
Fill in all the required particulars, including name, father's name, date of birth and age, nationality and religion, category, qualifications, and experience details.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all certificates supporting educational qualification, experience, and age.
Send the completed application to the address given below on or before 10.08.2026.
important_instructions: The crucial date for determining eligibility for age, qualification, and experience is the date of notification, i.e., 09.07.2026. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of the candidature. VPA reserves the right to cancel the notification, or to increase or decrease the number of posts, or to devise its own method of selecting candidates. Mere submission of an application does not entitle a candidate to a call for selection or interview. Only candidates recommended by the Certificate Verification Committee will be considered for selection/interview. For further details, candidates should visit the official Port website: www.vpt.shipping.gov.in (careers section).

content_sections.heading: Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Visakhapatnam Port Authority (VPA) Fire Officer recruitment 2026 has been announced through Employment Notice No. C2/03/2026, dated 09.07.2026, inviting applications for one Fire Officer post on a contract basis in the Marine Department. Download Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer Notification PDF

18 to 40 years as on date of notification

content_sections.heading: Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The Visakhapatnam Port Authority, under its General Administration Department (Personnel Division), has released a recruitment notice for the engagement of a Fire Officer on a contract basis to work in the Marine Department. Below is a quick overview table summarizing the key details of this recruitment.

rows.details: Contract basis, initially for one year
18 to 40 years as on date of notification

content_sections.heading: VPA Fire Officer Recruitment: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Date: 09.07.2026 Crucial Date for Determining Eligibility: 09.07.2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 10.08.2026 Candidates should note that the crucial date for determining eligibility (age, qualification, and experience) is the date of notification, i.e., 09.07.2026, and not the last date of application.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details for Fire Officer Post
content_sections.text: The recruitment is for a single post of Fire Officer to be engaged on a contract basis in the Marine Department of Visakhapatnam Port Authority.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for VPA Fire Officer Recruitment
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Fire Officer post must fulfil the educational qualification, experience, age, and physical standards specified in the notification, as on the date of notification. The essential educational qualifications for the Fire Officer post are as follows: Must be a Graduate from a recognized University or Institution. Must have undergone 6 (six) months of training in a recognized Fire Training Institute or College. Should possess a Driving License for Light and Heavy Vehicles. Experience requirements: Minimum 3 (three) years of working experience in a supervisory capacity in a large Fire Service Establishment in an Industry or Government Undertaking. Candidates recommended for interview will have to undergo a Heavy Vehicle driving test.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit and Physical Standards
content_sections.text: The age limit and physical standards prescribed for the Fire Officer post are given below: Apart from the qualifications above, candidates are expected to demonstrate the following capabilities: Excellent communication skills, especially in English, Hindi, and Telugu. Proficiency in operating computers and MS Office. Capability in all fire fighting and fire prevention arrangements in the Port area. Ability to handle correspondence related to Fire Service matters, establishment, and stores. Capability to supervise the Fire Safety Inspector's duties and responsibilities. Ability to advise and instruct on maintaining Fire Fighting Units in good repair. Capability to supervise safety arrangements for handling hazardous cargo in the Port area. Ability to maintain liaison with other fire fighting services in Visakhapatnam and implement the mutual aid scheme. Capability to assist in drawing up and implementing a Civil Defence Plan when required. Willingness to attend to all other duties as prescribed by the Competent Authorities.

rows.requirement: 18 to 40 years as on the date of notification

content_sections.heading: Salary and Contract Terms for Fire Officer
content_sections.text: The Fire Officer engaged on contract basis will be paid a consolidated monthly remuneration of Rs. 60,000/- (Rupees Sixty Thousand only), subject to applicability of the DoPT Office Memorandum on fixation of pay in respect of retired government employees. No other benefits are payable apart from this consolidated remuneration. Key terms and conditions of the contract include: Contract Duration: Initially one year from the date of joining/reporting, extendable at the discretion of the Port Authority based on satisfactory performance. The engagement does not confer any right to continuous employment or any regular appointment in VPA. Reporting and Duty: The candidate must report to duty immediately on issue of the appointment order and work under the control of the Dy. Conservator (HoD), VPA, at the Fire Service Section, with a minimum duty of 8 hours per day (general/shifts). Leave: Eligible for 12 days of leave in a calendar year on a pro-rata basis, subject to prior permission from the competent authority. Periodical Fitness: Required to undergo medical tests as prescribed in VPA Regulations and report to duty only after medical fitness is certified by the CMO/VPA. Training: On-the-job training to operate the Fire Fighting System at VPA is mandatory. Accommodation: A suitable Type IV quarter may be provided on request at standard/market rent, subject to availability (bachelor accommodation is not provided), with water, electricity, and conservancy charges payable on actuals. Mobile Reimbursement: Up to Rs. 500/- per month towards mobile phone recharge, or actuals, whichever is lower. Uniform: The Fire Officer must wear a proper uniform at his own cost during duty hours and follow all safety norms. Medical Facility: In case of any accident or injury while on duty, medical facilities will be provided only at GJH (Government/King George Hospital). Headquarters: The Fire Officer should not leave the headquarters without proper permission from the Deputy Conservator. Applicability of Regulations: The VPE (Temporary) Regulations do not apply to employees engaged on contract basis. Income Tax: Applicable income tax will be recovered from the remuneration as per extant IT Rules. Attendance: Must attend on all working days and Port holidays, including emergencies after duty hours, without any additional remuneration. Transport: The candidate must arrange his own transport for attending the work spot as per the schedule decided by the competent authority. Termination and Resignation: VPA reserves the right to terminate or rescind the contract at any time without assigning reasons. A Fire Officer wishing to resign must give one month's notice; failure to do so will result in forfeiture of one month's remuneration. Disputes: Any disputes arising during the contract period will be referred to the Chairperson, VPA, whose decision will be final and binding.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Visakhapatnam Port Authority Fire Officer recruitment 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification or Port website for any updates on this matter.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for the Fire Officer post, as per the notification, involves the following stages: Screening of applications and supporting documents by a Certificate Verification Committee. Only eligible candidates recommended by the Certificate Verification Committee will be considered for the interview. Candidates recommended for interview will also be required to undergo a Heavy Vehicle driving test. Note: Mere submission of an application does not confer any right to be called for selection or interview. VPA reserves the right to cancel the notification or increase/decrease the number of posts, and may also devise its own method of selecting candidates.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit the following along with their application: Duly filled Model Application Format (Annexure-I), preferably in typed format for more details. Self-attested photocopies of certificates in support of educational qualification. Self-attested photocopies of certificates in support of experience. Self-attested photocopy of proof of age. Latest Caste Certificate, if applicable (for SC/ST/OBC candidates). Valid Driving License for Light and Heavy Vehicles.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for VPA Fire Officer Post
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates need to apply offline by following these steps: Download or prepare the Model Application Format (Annexure-I) as given in the official notification, preferably in typed format. Fill in all the required particulars, including name, father's name, date of birth and age, nationality and religion, category, qualifications, and experience details. Attach self-attested photocopies of all certificates supporting educational qualification, experience, and age. Send the completed application to the address given below on or before 10.08.2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The crucial date for determining eligibility for age, qualification, and experience is the date of notification, i.e., 09.07.2026. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of the candidature. VPA reserves the right to cancel the notification, or to increase or decrease the number of posts, or to devise its own method of selecting candidates. Mere submission of an application does not entitle a candidate to a call for selection or interview. Only candidates recommended by the Certificate Verification Committee will be considered for selection/interview. For further details, candidates should visit the official Port website: www.vpt.shipping.gov.in (careers section).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Kannur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in ECHS Kannur Polyclinic Recruitment?
faq.answer: Total 03 vacancies – Laboratory Assistant (Kanhangad), Dental Hygienist (Iritty), and Peon (Kalpetta).

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for Laboratory Assistant in ECHS Kannur?
faq.answer: DMLT or Class I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces) with 5 years experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is ex-servicemen preference given in ECHS Polyclinic jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, preference is given to ex-servicemen and widows of ex-servicemen.

faq.question: Q5. Where to submit the application for ECHS Kannur contractual staff?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent to Station Cell (ECHS), C/o DSC Centre, Burnachery (PO), Kannur – 670 013.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Educational certificates, experience proofs, PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, and Discharge Book/PPO (for ex-servicemen).

faq.question: Q7. Will there be a written test for ECHS Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, written test will be conducted for Para-Medical staff (Laboratory Assistant & Dental Hygienist).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for these ECHS contractual posts?
faq.answer: Remuneration will be as per ECHS norms for contractual staff (not mentioned in advertisement; decided at the time of engagement).

faq.question: Q9. Can civilians apply for Peon post in ECHS Kannur?
faq.answer: Yes, 8th Class passed civilians with 5 years experience can apply.

faq.question: Q10. How to get the application form for ECHS Kannur Polyclinic vacancy?
faq.answer: Download the prescribed format from the official website www.echs.gov.in.
